title: TBD Map Object Instance (catalog v1 placement row)
description: One placed object. Compact: references its prefab by index; never duplicates kind/class/resourceName/bounds (resolve via prefabs[prefabId]). T-090.2. Two equivalent encodings: an expanded object (golden/readability) or a compact positional array [id, prefabId, x, y, z?, rotationDeg?] (T-110 binary compile input).

oneOf.description: Compact positional tuple [id, prefabId, x, y, z?, rotationDeg?] (T-110 binary compile input). Position 0 is the string id; 1 is the integer prefabId; 2..5 are numbers (x, y, z?, rotationDeg?).
